legalSections.title: 1. Information We Collect
legalSections.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, including name, contact information, and business details.

legalSections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
legalSections.content: We use the information we collect to provide and improve our services, process transactions, and send promotional communications.

legalSections.title: 3. Information Sharing
legalSections.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with service providers who assist in our operations.

legalSections.title: 4. Data Security
legalSections.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information.

legalSections.title: 5. Contact Us
legalSections.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Read the {business} Privacy Policy to learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit and interact with our website.
metadata.keywords: privacy policy {business}, personal information collection, data protection, website privacy, user privacy
